Description: End-to-end SaaS HR platform — employee records, payroll, leave, attendance, performance reviews, and onboarding
Features: Independently deployable microservices per HR domain (payroll, attendance, etc.)
Kafka event streaming between services (e.g. payroll triggered by attendance events)
Redis caching for employee profiles and dashboard metrics
ELK stack for centralized logging and operational visibility
Containerized with Docker; CI/CD via GitLab
impact: Scalable foundation supporting 1,000+ employees with room for multi-tenancy; directed delivery alongside companion CRM and LMS platforms.
